headline: Bernstein flags 2 data center equipment stocks to buy
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein initiated coverage of the U.S. multi-industrials and electrical equipment sector in a note on Wednesday, flagging Vertiv and nVent as its outperform-rated picks in data center power and cooling, with price targets implying 30% to 40% upside for each.

headline: BreachRx Appoints Stephen Garcia as Chief Information Security Officer
summary: Veteran security leader to advance platform trust, bring frontline CISO perspective to product development, and help shape industry understanding of AI-driven threats Stephen Garcia Headshot Stephen Garcia, Chief Information Security Officer of BreachRx SAN FRANCISCO, June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BreachRx, the leader in cyber incident response management (CIRM), today announced the appointment of Stephen Garcia as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO).
